name: Workflow A — WhatsApp Webhook Handler (Phase 4 voucher)

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (workflow_name, execution_id, level, event, message, data) VALUES ('workflow_a_inbound_whatsapp', $1, 'info', 'webhook_received', LEFT($2, 200), $3::jsonb);
INSERT INTO workflow_errors (workflow_name, execution_id, node_name, error_message, context) VALUES ('workflow_a_inbound_whatsapp', $1, 'Validate HMAC', $2, $3::jsonb);
INSERT INTO workflow_errors (workflow_name, execution_id, node_name, error_message, error_stack, context) VALUES ('workflow_a_inbound_whatsapp', $1, $2, $3, $4, $5::jsonb);
